evidence.text: Title: What John Allspaw's Blameless Postmortem Method Taught Our Incident Analysis Agent URL Source: https://dataworkers.io/blog/what-allspaw-blameless-postmortem-taught-our-incident-agent/ Published Time: 2026-06-07 Markdown Content: In May 2012, John Allspaw published a post on Etsy's engineering blog titled 'Blameless PostMortems and a Just Culture.' More than a decade later, it remains one of the most linked-to pieces in all of site reliability engineering. That staying power is not nostalgia.
